# Preface {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the electrophysiology course (TODO: name).

TODO: [think of a cool course name]()

This course will cover the full electrophysiology processing pipeline,
from start to finish. This includes 

- data preprocessing
- spike sorting,
- postproicessng and quality assessment
- integration with behavioural data.

Link to other pages, link to github

## Funding and Ackowledgements


- Wellcome Trust, Gatsby
- Funders for those who contributed materials?
- Niko
